selections.name: Margie's Girl
selections.reason: Strong 99 speed figure in debut, fits the juvenile sprint profile perfectly.

selections.name: Perpetual
selections.reason: First-time starter for Pletcher/Velazquez, commands respect on debut.

selections.name: Luminous Beauty
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (117) and solid 100 speed figure.

selections.name: Mindee's World
selections.reason: First-time starter with solid works, Carmouche aboard.

danger_horse.name: Dinner Party
danger_horse.reason: Pletcher/Irad Ortiz combination is always dangerous with firsters.

selections.name: Mythical
selections.reason: High speed figure (108) and class (117), draws well outside for a clean trip.

selections.name: Carmel Coast
selections.reason: Top speed figure (110) in the field, draws the rail which is a massive advantage at Saratoga.

selections.name: Paige Turner
selections.reason: Highest class rating (119) and consistent form cycle.

selections.name: Goodall
selections.reason: Strong 112 speed figure, Asmussen/Prat connection is potent.

selections.name: West End Kid
selections.reason: Massive 121 speed figure and 116 class, tactical speed to overcome the outside draw.

selections.name: Bottas
selections.reason: Inside draw on the inner turf is a huge advantage, strong 116 speed.

selections.name: Glavine
selections.reason: Classy runner with a 118 class rating, fits well in this spot.

selections.name: Noble Dynasty
selections.reason: Solid 110 speed figure, draws well in post 4.

danger_horse.name: Talk To Me Jimmy
danger_horse.reason: Classy dirt horse trying turf, could be a threat if it transfers.

selections.name: Directive
selections.reason: Dominant 114 speed and 118 class, Chad Brown/Flavien Prat combo.

selections.name: Pure Joy
selections.reason: Solid 105 speed figure, draws well inside for the 9F distance.

selections.name: Metfardeh
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 112 class rating, can hit the board.

selections.name: Reality Star
selections.reason: McGaughey/Irad Ortiz connection, 104 speed figure puts her in the mix.

danger_horse.name: U Lite Up My Life
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on her best day.

selections.name: Florida Patriot
selections.reason: Huge 121 speed figure last out, outside draw is fine for turf sprints.

selections.name: Bourbon Milk Punch
selections.reason: Consistent 114 speed figure, draws well in post 4.

selections.name: My Divine Spirit (gb)
selections.reason: Inside draw, 113 speed figure makes her a major player.

selections.name: I'm Very Sweet
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with Flavien Prat, always dangerous.

danger_horse.name: Nakoma
danger_horse.reason: Ran a 120 speed figure recently, could upset if she gets a trip.

selections.name: Careless Whisper
selections.reason: Strong 108 speed figure and 117 class, draws well inside.

selections.name: Liberty's Advance
selections.reason: Solid 97 speed figure, Bill Mott trainee with Junior Alvarado.

selections.name: Tuthilltown
selections.reason: Consistent 97 speed figure, Prat aboard for Brisset.

selections.name: Rizz
selections.reason: Ran a 98 speed figure, capable of hitting the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Gotta Gun Runner
danger_horse.reason: Irad Ortiz rides, 99 speed figure puts her in contention.

selections.name: Likeness

selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with a 111 speed figure, major threat.

selections.name: Operation Overlord
selections.reason: Top 114 speed figure, Pletcher and Irad Ortiz team up.

selections.name: I Am I Said (gb)
selections.reason: European shipper form, 94 speed figure could improve.

danger_horse.name: Emergence
danger_horse.reason: Brad Cox trainee with a 116 speed figure, very dangerous.

selections.name: In Our Time
selections.reason: Massive 125 speed figure, draws perfectly in post 3 for a turf sprint.

selections.name: Shoot It True
selections.reason: Wesley Ward trainee with a 113 speed figure, dangerous early speed.

selections.name: Gratefully
selections.reason: Strong 120 speed figure, consistent class.

selections.name: Creed's Gold
selections.reason: 120 speed figure, draws well inside.

danger_horse.name: Bam's Bliss Kiss
danger_horse.reason: Consistent runner with a 103 speed figure, could close late.

selections.reason: Solid 103 speed figure, Irad Ortiz rides.

selections.name: Magnanimous Max
selections.reason: Inside draw, consistent 98 speed figure.

selections.name: Miami Frank
selections.reason: Rail draw is huge, 107 speed figure makes him the one to beat.

selections.name: Cocktailsnkringle
selections.reason: 104 speed figure, Santana rides well on the turf.

danger_horse.name: Turn And Count

selections.name: Corruption

selections.name: Tawny Port

selections.name: Navy Seal (ire)
selections.reason: European stamina, 116 speed figure, inside draw.

selections.name: Flashiest

danger_horse.name: Parchment Party
danger_horse.reason: Bill Mott trainee, 111 speed figure, dangerous late.
